title: Cybersecurity engineering
body: Cybersecurity engineering is a software engineering discipline focused on the protection of systems, networks, and data from unauthorized access, cyberattacks, and other malicious activities, including cybercrimes. As part of security engineering, it applies engineering principles to the design, implementation, maintenance, and evaluation of secure systems, ensuring the integrity, confidentiality, and availability of information.
categories: Articles containing suspected AI-generated texts from November 2025
Articles with unsourced statements from October 2024
